items.title: Hearts want the Scottish title, but they also want...
items.summary: Hearts are 90 minutes from a first Scottish title since 1960 and their fans are hoping this is just the start.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'Exceptional' Kartik Sharma is beginning to live up to his billing
items.summary: "Since he has come at No. 4 or No. 5, he has been batting exceptionally well," Ambati Rayudu says about the CSK batter
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Thailand Open 2026: Satwiksairaj and Chirag Shetty storm into final
items.summary: India's top seeds Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty triumphed in a thrilling Thailand Open semifinal, overcoming Malaysia's Goh Sze Fei and Nur Izzuddin in a hard-fought...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
